The '''''Swiftsure''''' was one of six [[Inexpugnable-class tactical command ship|''Inexpugnable''-class tactical command ships]] to serve the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]].<ref name="SW:KOTORH" />

==History==
In [[3963 BBY]], the vessel prepared to leave its drydock within the [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]; it was speculated at the time that [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Saul Karath]] would be given command.<ref name="TAL:KHS">{{KOTORbackups|22}}</ref> The ship also underwent a refit while in the dockyards, having an improved sensor package installed that predicted enemy movements and made adjustments to the battle line.<ref name="GRDMDB" /><ref name="SW:KOTOR31" />

[[File:Swiftsure_formation.jpg|thumb|left|180px]]

Karath was indeed appointed as the ship's commanding officer, whereupon he prepared and executed a shakedown cruise in orbit above the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] capital of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Here, he made an arrangement with the [[Jedi Covenant]], through [[Lucien Draay]] who had by this time been appointed to the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], to take aboard [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Xamar]]. They were to intercept the fugitive [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Zayne Carrick]] before he could go planetside and, though Karath did not know it, to prevent him from revealing the truth about his masters and the Covenant.<ref name="SW:KOTOR30" /> The ship formed a defensive line around the planet with a fleet of [[Hammerhead-class cruiser|''Hammerhead''-class cruisers]], slaving their tactical and drive systems to its own.<ref name="SW:KOTOR31" />
